name: Hard Rock Cafe Baked Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 8 slices of bacon, fried crisp and reserved for drippings
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the bacon and set aside.
2. Cook onions in drippings over medium-high heat until transparent.
3. Add flour, stirring constantly to prevent lumps, and cook for 3-5 minutes until mixture just begins to turn golden.
4. Gradually add chicken broth (warmed if possible), whisking constantly until thickened. Reduce heat to a simmer.
5. Add potatoes, cream, paprika, parsley, garlic, basil, Tabasco pepper, and black pepper. Simmer for 10 minutes without boiling.
6. Stir in cheese and green onion until the cheese melts.
This can be made up to the point of adding the cheese and onion ahead of time. Reheat the soup very slowly and gently. Be careful that it does not boil before adding the cheese and green onion. Leftover soup reheats beautifully; freezing is not recommended.
